ascii Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual ascii Directory Reference(3)

NAME

ascii Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Directories


directory neon
directory scalar

Files


file ascii.h
file avx2.h
AVX2-optimized ASCII rendering functions. file common.h
SIMD-optimized ASCII conversion interface. file frame_validator.h
file neon.h
NEON-optimized ASCII rendering functions. file output_buffer.h
file palette.h
ASCII Palette Management for Video-to-ASCII Conversion. file rle.h
file sgr.h
ANSI SGR (Select Graphic Rendition) color sequence generation. file sse2.h
SSE2-optimized ASCII rendering functions. file ssse3.h
SSSE3-optimized ASCII rendering functions. file sve.h
SVE-optimized ASCII rendering functions.

Version 0.9.2 ascii-chat
